## Validation

- [ ] Lint/typecheck/tests run (or justify why not)
- [ ] Tests added/updated for behavior changes (or rationale provided)
- [ ] Self-review completed (scope, edge-cases, accidental edits)
- [ ] Scope is bootstrap-safe (no hidden production rollout)
- [ ] Status sync/event mapping impact documented

## Checklist

- [ ] Relevant docs updated
- [ ] `Proposal Ref:` populated for implementation changes
- [ ] Any credentials/Telegram wiring left as TODOs unless safely configured
